description_long: This object depicts a suburban residential neighborhood block featuring several single-family houses arranged along intersecting streets. The houses are modern in style, with flat and low-pitched roofs, large windows, and a mix of brick and stucco facades. Each house is set within its own fenced yard, some with driveways and visible garages, and the landscaping includes lawns, trees, and shrubs. The streets are wide and bordered by sidewalks, with parked cars and clear demarcation of property boundaries. The overall layout is open and organized, with green spaces and paved areas providing a sense of community. The scene is detailed, showing architectural features such as patios, entryways, and garden elements.
description: A modern suburban neighborhood block with several single-story houses, fenced yards, driveways, and landscaped streets. The houses feature flat and low-pitched roofs, large windows, and a mix of brick and stucco exteriors.
description_view_0: This view shows the neighborhood from above, highlighting the fenced yards, driveways, and the arrangement of houses along two intersecting streets.
description_view_1: From this angle, the garages, driveways, and the layout of the streets are more prominent, with visible parked cars and green spaces.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the rear yards, fences, and the back sides of the houses, as well as the distribution of trees and lawns.
description_view_3: The view focuses on the main street, entryways, and the front facades of the houses, with sidewalks and landscaping clearly visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some grouped in clusters
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature simple doors, some with small porches or overhangs, and direct access from driveways or sidewalks.
